evals.name: capture-decision
evals.prompt: Remember our decision: adopt hexagonal architecture for the payments service because it isolates the domain from the payment providers.
expect: Sets --source to the producing command/skill (or manual)
Body reads like a mini-ADR (context, decision, rationale, consequences)
Reports the new entry id and that it is pending

evals.name: snapshot-implementation
evals.prompt: We just finished the login endpoint. Save it so we can undo it later.
expect: Calls ledger.py snapshot rather than a plain log
Explains the change can be rolled back via the recorded patch

evals.name: review-pending
evals.prompt: What's pending and let me accept the database one.
expect: Lists pending entries via ledger.py pending/list
Only marks an entry accepted on explicit user intent
Confirms the new status after accepting

evals.name: rollback-safety
expect: Reverts the working tree only and does not commit
Tells the user to review git diff and commit
Stops and explains if the patch does not apply cleanly
